sourceMovie.title: The Thursday Murder Club
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Thursday Murder Club works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and mystery blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Knives Out
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Thursday Murder Club clicked for you, Knives Out (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and mystery, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Thursday Murder Club?
faq.answer: Try Knives Out, Kiss Kiss Bang Bang, Clue—each shares DNA with The Thursday Murder Club while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Thursday Murder Club?
faq.answer: The Thursday Murder Club (2025) is best described as Comedy, Mystery, Crime. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Thursday Murder Club worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.6/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
